FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 23
Aries and Scorpio are the houses of Mars.
Taurus and Libra are the houses of Venus
Gemini and Virgo are the houses of Mercury.
Cancer for Moon.
Sun for Leo,
Sagittarius and Piseces for Jupiter.
Capricorn and Aquarius for Saturn.
They are the owners of 12-Zodiacal signs accordingly.
In the above Zodiacal chart, also called the universal Rasi
chart, Sun occupying the Leo sign represents the Father and Moon
occupying the Cancer sign represents the mother. In the anti-
